channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Version Catalog Extractor - Tue Jun 16 18:03:27 UTC 2026
item.description:
Detects hardcoded dependency versions in Gradle Kotlin and Groovy DSL files and offers a quick fix to move them to gradle/libs.versions.toml. If the version catalog...
vendor: Yuri Luttsev downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: io.github.yluttsev.version-catalog-extractor

item.title: Git Branch Stats - Tue Jun 16 21:27:49 UTC 2026
item.description:

vendor: BlueBoxProduction downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: com.gitbranchstats
